name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence
description: Substrate-neutral evidence selection contracts and deterministic reference substrates for Lachesis
author: Nicia AI

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const api = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence'); if (typeof api.createInMemoryGraphEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.createGraphSelectedFactsEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.createGraphSelectedAdjacencyEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.createMatchedTextEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.blindM3a1IntegrityAudit !== 'function' || typeof api.auditM3aOfflineDesign !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
